name: BPCL SBI Card
exclusions: fuel spends outside eligible BPCL reward construct
transactions excluded under BPCL SBI Card terms
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee reversal on annual spends of Rs 50,000 or more in the previous year
additionalBenefits: 2,000 activation bonus Reward Points worth Rs 500 on payment of joining fee
13 Reward Points per Rs 100 on fuel purchases at BPCL petrol pumps, capped at 1,300 Reward Points per billing cycle
5 Reward Points per Rs 100 on grocery, departmental stores, movies and dining spends, capped at 5,000 Reward Points per month
1 Reward Point per Rs 100 on other eligible non-fuel retail purchases
4 Reward Points equal Re 1 and can be redeemed for fuel at participating BPCL outlets or through SBI Card rewards options
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible BPCL fuel transactions up to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 100 per month
No minimum reward point threshold for eligible BPCL fuel redemption
